context: A little boy enjoys the beach at sunset while his family cheers him on from the shoreline.

actions.description: Boy starts running barefoot across the sand as sunset color reflects on the sea.
He runs faster, kicking up small puffs of sand while seagulls cross the orange sky.
He turns his smile toward the distant family, then keeps running beside the calm water.
